since_last: 52% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.02%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 52% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +1.19% · Gold +0.16% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 52% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.02%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.02%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.62%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +6.24%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +6.24%, BABA +4.67%, TER +3.54%, MDB +3.53%, MRVL +3.32%. Laggards: ORCL -3.98%, DELL -3.65%, SPCX -3.34%, TLN -3.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.34% at $119.85
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.34% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
